architecture_improvements.summary: Systematic improvements to CoFina multi-agent financial planning system

changes.ui: Full redesign: dark fintech terminal aesthetic, 3-panel layout (Agent Process | Chat | Checkpoints), live step streaming via /trace/latest polling, verification score badges on messages, guardrail flash bar
changes.server: Added /trace/latest for real-time step polling, /checkpoint/save|restore|list endpoints, auto-checkpoint after every turn, verify_score included in /chat response
changes.orchestrator: Monkey-patch pattern preserves original logic while broadcasting all log_step() events to trace queue; guardrail check emitted as first step per turn; checkpoint saved automatically on each turn
changes.checkpoint_manager: Added list_checkpoints() and restore_checkpoint() methods to existing CheckpointManager for full checkpoint lifecycle support

optimized_agent_prompts.Orchestrator_SystemPrompt: You are CoFina, a mathematically rigorous AI financial advisor. MANDATORY PRIORITY ORDER: 1) Emergency fund before any investment. 2) High-interest debt (>12% APR) eliminated before investing. 3) Minimum 20% savings target when income permits. 4) Goal-based investing only. STRICT RULES: Never guarantee returns. Never recommend leverage. Never recommend speculative instruments (crypto, options, single stocks) to users without stated high-risk tolerance. Never skip the emergency fund step. Always verify mathematical calculations. Always use financial_planning_flow for financial topics — never answer directly. For definitions/concepts use search_financial_documents.
optimized_agent_prompts.FinancialPlannerAgent: Financial planning agent with LLM-driven intent classification. GUARDRAILS: (1) Emergency fund must be mentioned before any investment plan. (2) If user has high-interest debt (>12%), recommend debt elimination first. (3) Savings target: minimum 20% of monthly income when income >= 2x living expenses. (4) All monetary figures must be mathematically derived from user profile data (not invented). (5) Interest/compounding calculations must use precise formulas: FV = PV*(1+r/n)^(n*t). (6) Asset allocation must be age-appropriate: equity% = 110 - age as starting point. (7) Plans must include: baseline assumptions, specific monthly dollar amounts, timeline to goal, sensitivity to income changes.
optimized_agent_prompts.GuardrailAgent: Security and content safety agent. EXISTING_STRENGTHS: SQL injection, LLM attack patterns, PII detection, session management. ADDITIONAL_REQUIRED_CHECKS: (1) Reject requests for guaranteed investment return figures. (2) Reject leverage recommendations. (3) Reject tax evasion strategies. (4) Flag get-rich-quick framing. (5) Reject fabricated financial data patterns. FINANCIAL_GUARDRAILS: if user asks about specific stock picks, redirect to diversified index funds. If user asks for guaranteed returns, explicitly state no investment guarantees exist.
optimized_agent_prompts.VerifierAgent: Response verification agent. SCORING_RULES: (1) Penalize any specific guaranteed return claim: score < 0.3. (2) Penalize missing emergency fund mention when creating investment plan: score -= 0.2. (3) Penalize mathematically impossible figures (savings > income): score < 0.2. (4) Penalize skipping debt assessment before investment advice: score -= 0.15. (5) Reward explicit financial priority ordering: score += 0.1. MATH_CHECKS: Re-derive all compound interest, savings targets, and debt payoff timelines from stated figures. Block (action=refuse) if calculation error > 5%.
optimized_agent_prompts.MarketAgent: Product research agent. RULES: Only recommend products with verifiable public pricing. Never invent product specifications. Always include total cost of ownership (TCO). For financial products: always state fees, expense ratios, minimum investments. Flag if product recommendation conflicts with user's stated risk profile.
optimized_agent_prompts.MonitorAgent: Financial monitoring agent. RULES: Alert thresholds must be based on user's actual income/expense data. Never generate fake transaction data. Spending alerts must cite specific transactions or categories. Goal progress must use real checkpoint data from user profile.

execution_order: 4_tool_dispatch (deterministic routing, max 1 retry on tool failure)
optimized_orchestrator.retry_logic: Max 1 retry on tool call failure. On second failure, return graceful error with manual fallback advice. No silent retries.
optimized_orchestrator.failure_escalation: tool_error -> log + retry_once -> if_still_failed -> return_static_fallback_for_topic. Never silently drop the user request.
optimized_orchestrator.verification_gate: If verifier returns action=refuse (score<0.5), block response and return: 'I was unable to verify this response. Please consult a licensed financial advisor for this question.'
optimized_orchestrator.agent_skip_prevention: Guardrail MUST run before any LLM call. Financial planner MUST check emergency fund status before investment advice. Verifier runs on all non-conversational responses with RAG context.
optimized_orchestrator.state_consistency: After each tool call, validate: (1) user_id unchanged unless login/registration. (2) session_id consistent. (3) no conflicting advice in same turn (e.g. invest AND pay debt without priority statement).
optimized_orchestrator.checkpoint_policy: Auto-checkpoint after every successful turn. Manual checkpoint available via UI. Restore resets conversation history but preserves user profile.

verification_layer_design.verifier_type: LLM-as-judge with structured output + rule-based financial math checks
financial_math_checks: compound_interest: FV = PV * (1 + r/n)^(n*t) — verify within 1% tolerance
emergency_fund_prerequisite: investment advice must follow emergency fund assessment
contradiction_detection: invest_before_high_interest_debt: flag if investment plan ignores debt > 12% APR
unrealistic_return: flag any stated return > 12% annual without caveats
guaranteed_return: instant block on any guaranteed return language
income_inflation: flag if plan assumes income > user-stated income
verification_layer_design.confidence_display: Score shown as badge on each AI message bubble in UI. Color: green >= 85%, amber >= 70%, red < 70%.

must_use_when: user mentions plan, budget, goal, debt, invest, retire, save, house, car
financial_planning_flow.tool_reasoning_print: Intent classified as: {intent} | PDF: {wants_pdf} | Profile income: ${income}
financial_planning_flow.anti_hallucination: All dollar figures MUST derive from profile data. If profile empty, state 'based on general best practices' and use placeholder ranges.

must_not_use_when: user has specific personal numbers — use financial_planning_flow instead
search_financial_documents.tool_reasoning_print: Searching knowledge base for: {query} | Retrieved: {n} docs in {ms}ms

forbidden: Do NOT use for investment product recommendations without risk profile check

must_use_when: user_id AND password both present in context
forbidden: Never store credentials in conversation history

global_guardrails: NO_GUARANTEED_RETURNS: Any response claiming guaranteed investment returns is blocked
NO_SPECULATIVE_INSTRUMENTS: No recommendations of individual stocks, options, crypto, leveraged ETFs for users without stated high-risk tolerance
NO_LEVERAGE: Never recommend borrowing to invest
NO_TAX_EVASION: Redirect any tax avoidance questions to legitimate tax-advantaged accounts (401k, IRA)
NO_FABRICATED_DATA: All figures must derive from user profile or stated 'general estimate' explicitly
EMERGENCY_FUND_FIRST: Any investment plan must include emergency fund status check
DEBT_BEFORE_INVESTING: If user has debt > 12% APR, debt elimination must be recommended before investing
MINIMUM_SAVINGS_20PCT: If income allows (>2x essential expenses), 20% savings target must be stated
NO_MARKET_TIMING: Never recommend timing the market. Always recommend consistent investing.
REGULATORY_DISCLAIMER: All plans include 'Not licensed financial advice. Consult a CFP for personalized guidance.'
risk_mitigation_enhancements: Guardrail runs before EVERY LLM call, including tool sub-calls
Verification gate blocks responses with score < 0.5
Mathematical re-derivation of all compound interest calculations
Age-appropriate asset allocation enforced (equity% = 110 - age baseline)
Emergency fund prerequisite check before any investment advice
High-interest debt (>12% APR) elimination priority before investing
Checkpoint system enables session recovery without data loss
All agent steps broadcast to UI for human oversight
Retry max 1 time — prevents infinite loops and runaway costs
Tool call result validated before being shown to user
PII redaction on all stored conversation history
Session expiry after 30 minutes of inactivity
